statement: AMD announced plans to deploy up to 6 gigawatts of AMD Instinct GPUs with Meta, the first 1-GW powered by a custom MI450-based GPU.
why: A multi-gigawatt Instinct deployment commitment is a major merchant-GPU design win expanding AMD's AI accelerator demand pipeline.

impact.mechanism: Large multi-year GPU deployment commitment locks in future demand for AMD Instinct accelerators.

evidence.source: AMD Investor Relations Q1 2026 earnings release
evidence.excerpt: announced plans to deploy up to 6 gigawatts of AMD Instinct GPUs, with the first 1-GW to be powered by a custom AMD Instinct MI450-based GPU

confidence.basis: Primary official AMD IR earnings release.
